source_note: JP→zh/en 機械翻訳 (Claude opus, D-136)。figure 問は図を参照し OCR 混入を除去した stem_jp_clean を併記。出典は IPA 過去問 (改変=OCR修復+翻訳)。

stem.zh:
A公司计划开发一套新系统。为了使该系统的著作权归属于A公司，下列哪一项列出了所有且仅有的必要做法？这里假定没有任何关于著作权的特别合同或约定。

① A公司将开发工作全部委托外包。
② A公司与受托开发的公司签订保密协议。
③ 由A公司的员工和派遣员工进行开发。
stem.en:
Company A plans to develop a new system. Which option lists all and only the actions necessary for the copyright of that system to belong to Company A? Here, assume there is no special contract or agreement concerning copyright.

(1) Company A outsources all of the development.
(2) Company A concludes a confidentiality (non-disclosure) agreement with the company to which the development was outsourced.
(3) The development is carried out by Company A's own employees and dispatched (temporary) workers.

ア.zh: ①，②

イ.zh: ①，③

ウ.zh: ②，③

エ.zh: ③

2013h25a-q002.stem_jp_clean: 証券業を営む A 社は, システムベンダの B 社に株式注文システム構築プロジェクトを委託している。当該プロジェクトの運用テストにおいて, A 社が定めている “株式注文時の責任者承認における例外ルール” を B 社が把握できていなかったことに起因する不良を発見した。ルールを明らかにするのはどの段階で行うべきであったか。

stem.zh: 经营证券业务的 A 公司将股票委托下单系统的构建项目委托给了系统供应商 B 公司。在该项目的运行测试中，发现了一个缺陷，其原因是 B 公司未能掌握 A 公司所制定的“股票下单时责任人审批的例外规则”。明确该规则的工作本应在哪个阶段进行？
stem.en: Company A, which operates a securities business, has outsourced a stock order system construction project to system vendor Company B. During the operational test of this project, a defect was found that was caused by Company B's failure to understand the "exception rule for manager approval at the time of stock orders" that Company A had established. At which stage should the rule have been clarified?

ア.zh: 业务需求定义
ア.en: Business requirements definition

イ.zh: 系统测试需求定义
イ.en: System test requirements definition

ウ.zh: 系统需求定义
ウ.en: System requirements definition

エ.zh: 软件需求定义
エ.en: Software requirements definition

stem.zh: 下列哪一项是对 ROE (Return On Equity，净资产收益率) 的说明？
stem.en: Which of the following describes ROE (Return On Equity)?

ア.zh: 不仅站在股东的立场，还包括债权人在内，从资金提供者的角度，表示企业所拥有的全部资产的盈利性的指标
ア.en: An indicator that, from the standpoint of fund providers including not only shareholders but also creditors, expresses the profitability of all the assets the company owns

イ.zh: 从股东的立场，表示企业产生了多少超过资本成本的利润的指标
イ.en: An indicator that, from the standpoint of shareholders, expresses how much profit the company generated in excess of its cost of capital

ウ.zh: 表示当前股价相当于上期实际或本期预期每股利润多少倍的指标
ウ.en: An indicator that expresses how many times the current stock price is relative to earnings per share, based on the previous period's actual results or the current period's forecast

エ.zh: 表示相对于自有资本产生了多少利润的指标
エ.en: An indicator that expresses how much profit was generated relative to shareholders' equity (own capital)

stem.zh: 下列哪一项不属于个人信息？
stem.en: Which of the following is NOT personal information?

ア.zh: 记载于五十音顺序电话簿中的姓名、住址、电话号码
ア.en: A name, address, and phone number listed in a phone book ordered by the Japanese syllabary (gojuon)

イ.zh: 记载有本公司员工姓名、住址的通讯录
イ.en: An address book containing the names and addresses of the company's own employees

ウ.zh: 仅由员工编号构成、无法与其他信息轻易比对识别的员工名单
ウ.en: An employee list consisting only of employee codes that cannot be easily cross-referenced with other information

エ.zh: 防盗摄像头记录的、可识别出个人的影像
エ.en: Footage recorded by a security camera in which an individual can be identified

stem.zh: 作为引入 SCM 的效果，最恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is the most appropriate effect of introducing SCM?

ア.zh: 能够迅速掌握客户对应收账款的付款情况。
ア.en: It enables prompt grasp of customers' payment status for accounts receivable.

イ.zh: 能够在整个销售部门内共享针对客户的接洽方法。
イ.en: It enables the entire sales department to share approaches to customers.

ウ.zh: 能够配合客户需求及时供应商品。
ウ.en: It enables timely supply of products to meet customer demands.

エ.zh: 能够加深对客户在每件商品上的需求的理解。
エ.en: It enables a deeper understanding of customer needs for each individual product.

stem.zh: 计算本期净利润的公式是哪一个？
stem.en: Which is the formula for calculating net income (profit for the current period)?

ア.zh: （毛利润）－（销售费用及一般管理费用）
ア.en: (Gross profit) − (Selling, general and administrative expenses)

イ.zh: （销售额）－（销售成本）
イ.en: (Net sales) − (Cost of sales)

ウ.zh: （营业利润）＋（营业外收益）－（营业外费用）
ウ.en: (Operating profit) + (Non-operating income) − (Non-operating expenses)

エ.zh: （经常利润）＋（特别利益）－（特别损失）－（企业所得税、居民税及事业税）
エ.en: (Ordinary profit) + (Extraordinary income) − (Extraordinary loss) − (Corporate tax, inhabitant tax and enterprise tax)

stem.zh: 对企业编制的会计报表等进行审计的人是谁？
stem.en: Who audits the financial statements and other calculation documents prepared by a company?

ア.zh: 会计审计人
ア.en: Accounting auditor

イ.zh: 系统审计员
イ.en: System auditor

ウ.zh: 司法书士
ウ.en: Judicial scrivener

エ.zh: 税务师
エ.en: Tax accountant

2013h25a-q008.stem_jp_clean: 技術を理解している者が企業経営について学び, 技術革新をビジネスに結びつけようとする考え方はどれか。

stem.zh: 懂技术的人学习企业经营，力图将技术革新与业务相结合的理念是哪一个？
stem.en: Which of the following is the concept in which a person who understands technology learns about business management and tries to link technological innovation to business?

ア.zh: JIT
ア.en: JIT

イ.zh: MOT（技术经营）
イ.en: MOT (Management of Technology)

ウ.zh: OJT
ウ.en: OJT

エ.zh: TQM
エ.en: TQM

stem.zh: 在利用互联网的广告中，事先取得接收者的同意，再将接收者感兴趣领域的广告通过邮件发送的是哪一项？
stem.en: Among Internet-based advertising, which one obtains the recipient's consent in advance and then sends advertisements about fields the recipient is interested in by email?

ア.zh: 联盟营销广告
ア.en: Affiliate advertising

イ.zh: 覆盖式广告（overlay 广告）
イ.en: Overlay advertising

ウ.zh: 选择退出（opt-out）邮件广告
ウ.en: Opt-out email advertising

エ.zh: 选择加入（opt-in）邮件广告
エ.en: Opt-in email advertising

stem.zh: 在面向服务的架构（SOA）中，构成“服务”的要素，哪一项是恰当的？
stem.en: Which of the following is an appropriate element that makes up a "service" in a service-oriented architecture (SOA)?

ア.zh: 呼叫中心针对客户的咨询、需求和投诉所采取处理措施的单位
ア.en: A unit of action taken by a call center in response to inquiries, requests, and complaints from customers

イ.zh: 系统集成商根据客户需求所提供的解决方案的单位
イ.en: A unit of solution provided by a system integrator to meet a customer's requirements

ウ.zh: 从使用者一方来看，在业务流程中具有意义的独立功能的单位
ウ.en: A unit of independent function that has meaning within a business process as seen from the user's side

エ.zh: 信息系统部门针对使用部门提出的需求所进行的开发、变更等的单位
エ.en: A unit of development, change, etc. performed by the information systems department in response to requests from user departments

stem.zh: 关于经营理念的描述中，最恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following statements about a management philosophy is the most appropriate?

ア.zh: 每隔 1～2 年进行一次审视并加以修订。
ア.en: It is something that is reviewed and revised every one or two years.

イ.zh: 表达了企业的使命与存在意义。
イ.en: It expresses the mission and the reason for existence of the company.

ウ.zh: 是将经营计划和经营方针具体化后的产物。
ウ.en: It is a concrete embodiment of the management plan and management policy.

エ.zh: 是未在社是、社训等中明文规定的东西。
エ.en: It is something that is not explicitly stated in the company motto, company precepts, and so on.

2013h25a-q012.stem_jp_clean:
ある資材を三つの工場 A，B，C に配分して，製品を生産している。資材の配分個数に応じた工場の利益は表のとおりである。合計4個の資材を工場に配分することによって得られる最大の利益は，何百万円か。

単位 百万円

| 資材の配分個数 | 0 個 | 1 個 | 2 個 | 3 個 | 4 個 |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| A 工場の利益 | 0 | 2 | 5 | 7 | 8 |
| B 工場の利益 | 0 | 1 | 3 | 5 | 7 |
| C 工場の利益 | 0 | 3 | 4 | 6 | 8 |

stem.zh:
将某种物资分配给三个工厂 A、B、C 来生产产品。各工厂根据物资分配数量所获得的利润如下表所示。将合计 4 个物资分配给各工厂时，可获得的最大利润为多少百万日元？

单位 百万日元

| 物资的分配数量 | 0 个 | 1 个 | 2 个 | 3 个 | 4 个 |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| A 工厂的利润 | 0 | 2 | 5 | 7 | 8 |
| B 工厂的利润 | 0 | 1 | 3 | 5 | 7 |
| C 工厂的利润 | 0 | 3 | 4 | 6 | 8 |
stem.en:
A certain material is distributed among three factories A, B, and C to produce products. The profit of each factory according to the number of allocated material units is shown in the table below. When a total of 4 units of material are distributed among the factories, what is the maximum profit (in millions of yen) that can be obtained?

Unit: millions of yen

| Number of material units allocated | 0 units | 1 unit | 2 units | 3 units | 4 units |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Factory A profit | 0 | 2 | 5 | 7 | 8 |
| Factory B profit | 0 | 1 | 3 | 5 | 7 |
| Factory C profit | 0 | 3 | 4 | 6 | 8 |

2013h25a-q013.stem_jp_clean: 親会社が, 子会社を含めた企業集団の一会計期間の収益と費用の状態を示した連結財務諸表はどれか。

stem.zh: 由母公司编制、用于反映包含子公司在内的企业集团在一个会计期间内收入与费用状况的合并财务报表是哪一项？
stem.en: Which consolidated financial statement, prepared by the parent company, shows the revenue and expense situation of the corporate group, including its subsidiaries, over one accounting period?

ア.zh: 合并所有者权益变动表
ア.en: Consolidated statement of changes in shareholders' equity

イ.zh: 合并现金流量表
イ.en: Consolidated cash flow statement

ウ.zh: 合并损益表
ウ.en: Consolidated income statement

エ.zh: 合并资产负债表
エ.en: Consolidated balance sheet

2013h25a-q014.stem_jp_clean: ビジネス戦略上の重要成功要因として"販売の機会損失の低減"が設定されたとき、この重要成功要因の達成度を評価するのに最も適切な指標はどれか。

stem.zh: 当业务战略上的关键成功要因（CSF）被设定为"降低销售机会损失"时，下列哪一项指标最适合用于评价该关键成功要因的达成程度？
stem.en: When "reducing lost sales opportunities" is set as a critical success factor (CSF) in a business strategy, which indicator is most appropriate for evaluating the degree of achievement of this critical success factor?

ア.zh: 应收账款周转期
ア.en: Accounts receivable turnover period

イ.zh: 销售利润率
イ.en: Profit margin on sales

ウ.zh: 缺货率
ウ.en: Stockout rate

エ.zh: 新增客户获取数
エ.en: Number of new customers acquired

2013h25a-q015.stem_jp_clean: クラスの学生の8科目の成績をそれぞれ5段階で評価した。クラスの平均点と学生の成績の比較や、科目間の成績のバランスを評価するために用いるグラフとして、最も適切なものはどれか。

stem.zh: 对班级学生的 8 个科目的成绩分别按 5 个等级进行了评价。为了比较班级平均分与学生本人的成绩，以及评价各科目之间成绩的均衡性，最适合使用的图表是哪一个？
stem.en: The grades of students in a class for 8 subjects were each evaluated on a 5-level scale. Which graph is most appropriate for comparing the class average with a student's own grades, and for evaluating the balance of grades across the subjects?

ア.zh: 饼图
ア.en: Pie chart

イ.zh: 散点图
イ.en: Scatter plot

ウ.zh: 帕累托图
ウ.en: Pareto chart

エ.zh: 雷达图
エ.en: Radar chart

2013h25a-q016.stem_jp_clean:
a〜d の機器のうち, 組込みシステムが実装されているものを全て挙げたものはどれか。
a 飲料自動販売機 b カーナビゲーション装置 c 携帯型ゲーム機 d 携帯電話機

stem.zh:
在 a～d 这些设备中，全部列出已搭载嵌入式系统的设备是哪一项？
a 自动售货机（饮料）  b 车载导航装置  c 便携式游戏机  d 手机
stem.en:
Among devices a to d, which option lists all of those that have an embedded system implemented in them?
a A beverage vending machine  b A car navigation device  c A handheld game console  d A mobile phone

ア.zh: a，b
ア.en: a, b

イ.zh: a，b，c，d
イ.en: a, b, c, d

ウ.en: a, c, d

エ.zh: b，c
エ.en: b, c

stem.zh: 关于提案邀请书（RFP）的说明，恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is an appropriate description of a request for proposal (RFP)?

ア.zh: 由供应商（承接方）编制，目的是请求委托方企业提出系统化的需求。
ア.en: It is created by the vendor (the supplier) for the purpose of asking the client company to present its requirements for system development.

イ.zh: 由委托方企业与供应商（承接方）共同编制，目的是准确而具体地确定开发内容。
イ.en: It is created jointly by the client company and the vendor (the supplier) for the purpose of accurately and concretely specifying the development content.

ウ.zh: 由委托方企业编制，目的是要求作为承接候选的供应商提出具体的系统提案。
ウ.en: It is created by the client company for the purpose of requesting the candidate vendors to make concrete system proposals.

エ.zh: 由委托方企业编制，目的是广泛收集信息、积累专业技能与知识。
エ.en: It is created by the client company for the purpose of broadly collecting information and accumulating know-how and knowledge.

stem.zh: 在 SWOT 分析所使用的四个视角中，可能构成"威胁"的事例是哪一个？
stem.en: Which of the following could be an example of a "threat", one of the four perspectives used in SWOT analysis?

ア.zh: 家电厂商 A 公司：由于技术实力下降，新产品开发件数正在减少。
ア.en: Home appliance maker Company A: due to a decline in technical capability, the number of new product developments is decreasing.

イ.zh: 汽车销售公司 B 公司：销售人员的积极性与以往相比呈下降趋势。
イ.en: Automobile sales Company B: the motivation of sales staff is trending downward compared to before.

ウ.zh: 品牌店 C 公司：品牌好感度正在下降。
ウ.en: Brand shop Company C: brand favorability has been declining.

エ.zh: 出口企业 D 公司：汇率持续呈日元升值的基调。
エ.en: Export enterprise Company D: the exchange rate continues to move with a trend toward yen appreciation.

2013h25a-q019.stem_jp_clean: システムのライフサイクルを企画プロセス, 要件定義プロセス, 開発プロセス, 運用プロセス, 保守プロセスに分けたとき, 企画プロセスの完了時の状態として適切なものはどれか。

stem.zh: 将系统的生命周期划分为规划流程、需求定义流程、开发流程、运行流程、维护流程时，作为规划流程完成时的状态，下列哪一项是恰当的？
stem.en: When the system life cycle is divided into the planning process, requirements definition process, development process, operation process, and maintenance process, which of the following is the appropriate state at the completion of the planning process?

ア.zh: 为达成经营目标所需的系统化范围、系统构成以及基本架构已经确定。
ア.en: The scope of systemization, the system configuration, and the basic architecture required to achieve the management objectives have been determined.

イ.zh: 针对系统的需求和约束事项已经确定。
イ.en: The requirements and constraints for the system have been determined.

ウ.zh: 对照系统需求进行了最优化的软件需求已经确定。
ウ.en: The software requirements optimized in light of the system requirements have been determined.

エ.zh: 关于包含目标系统在内的业务及运行所用组织的需求已经确定。
エ.en: The requirements concerning the organization for the business and operations that include the target system have been determined.

2013h25a-q020.stem_jp_clean: IT を企業の経営戦略の実現に役立てて行くために, 情報戦略の立案に当たって留意すべきこととして, 最も適切なものはどれか。

stem.zh: 为了使 IT 有助于实现企业的经营战略，在制定信息战略时应当注意的事项，最恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: To make IT useful for realizing a company's management strategy, which of the following is the most appropriate point to keep in mind when formulating the information strategy?

ア.zh: 经营战略的制定由高层管理者负责，而信息战略的制定由信息系统部门负责，二者应相互独立地推进。
ア.en: Formulating the management strategy is handled by top management, while formulating the information strategy is handled by the information systems department; these should be advanced independently of each other.

イ.zh: 在信息化时，应在调查现行业务的业务功能和业务流程之后，以利用 IT 将现行业务的流程本身自动化为目标。
イ.en: In the course of informatization, after investigating the business functions and business flows of current operations, aim to automate the current business processes themselves by utilizing IT.

ウ.zh: 在信息化时，应明确信息系统应有的状态，并研究信息系统的目的和功能是否与经营战略相符等问题。
ウ.en: In the course of informatization, clarify the ideal form that the information system should take, and examine whether the purpose and functions of the information system conform to the management strategy.

エ.zh: 在信息战略的制定阶段，将初期成本作为系统费用进行评估，而关于系统运行和维护的费用，则在运行开始时重新评估。
エ.en: At the stage of formulating the information strategy, evaluate the initial cost as the system cost, and re-evaluate the costs related to system operation and maintenance at the time operation begins.

2013h25a-q021.stem_jp_clean: 携帯電話機や家電などで用いられる無線通信の標準化規格である Bluetooth の活用事例はどれか。

stem.zh: 蓝牙（Bluetooth）是用于手机和家电等设备的无线通信标准化规格。下列哪一项是它的应用实例？
stem.en: Bluetooth is a standardized wireless communication specification used in devices such as mobile phones and home appliances. Which of the following is an application example of it?

ア.zh: 将 2 个手柄无线连接到 1 台家用游戏机上。
ア.en: Wirelessly connecting two controllers to a single home game console.

イ.zh: 在汽车导航系统中接收来自人造卫星的信号。
イ.en: Receiving signals from satellites in a car navigation system.

ウ.zh: 用手机读取 QR 码。
ウ.en: Reading a QR code with a mobile phone.

エ.zh: 读取在自动检票机上刷过的 IC 乘车卡的信息。
エ.en: Reading the information of an IC transit card held over an automatic ticket gate.

stem.zh: 关于目标营销（target marketing）的说明，恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is an appropriate description of target marketing?

ア.zh: 将企业活动分解为各个价值活动，分析每项活动所产生的附加值。
ア.en: Break down corporate activities into individual value activities and analyze the added value of each activity.

イ.zh: 从成长性和市场份额的角度对业务或产品进行分类，根据定位进行最优的资源配置。
イ.en: Classify businesses or products by their growth potential and market share, and allocate resources optimally according to their positioning.

ウ.zh: 将市场划分为若干个细分市场，针对少数细分市场进行集中的营销。
ウ.en: Divide the market into several segments and take an approach focused on a small number of segments.

エ.zh: 将商品从导入市场到衰退为止的期间进行划分，为各个期间设定相应的战略。
エ.en: Divide the period from a product's market introduction until its decline into stages, and set a strategy corresponding to each stage.

stem.zh: 在软件产品中，属于外观设计法保护对象的是哪一项？
stem.en: In software products, which of the following is subject to protection under the Design Act?

ア.zh: 由软件产品实现的创意（构思）
ア.en: An idea realized by the software product

イ.zh: 软件产品的商品名称
イ.en: The product name of the software product

ウ.zh: 软件产品操作手册的记载内容
ウ.en: The content described in the software product's operation manual

ア.zh: 公开收购的期间、股数、价格等，在市场外收购特定企业的股票。
ア.en: Publicly announcing the purchase period, number of shares, price, etc., and buying the shares of a specific company outside the market.

イ.zh: 企业之间结成出资或相互持股等合作关系。
イ.en: Forming a cooperative relationship between companies, such as capital investment or cross-shareholding.

ウ.zh: 企业的经营层收购本公司的股票，自己成为所有者。
ウ.en: The management of a company acquires its own shares and becomes the owner themselves.

エ.zh: 通过以被收购企业的资产作为担保的借款来收购该企业。
エ.en: Acquiring a company through borrowing that is secured by the assets of the company being acquired.

stem.zh: 在《禁止非法访问法》中，受到管制的行为是哪一项？

ア.zh: 从感染了病毒的个人所有 PC 向公司发送邮件，将病毒扩散到了公司内部。
ア.en: Sent an email to the company from a personally owned PC infected with a virus, spreading the virus throughout the company.

イ.zh: 在公司访问服务器，将用于在家办公的信息下载到 USB 存储器中带回了家。
イ.en: Accessed a server at the company, downloaded information needed for working from home onto a USB memory stick, and took it home.

ウ.zh: 得知了公司的违法行为，将该信息公开在了由第三方运营的网站留言板上。
ウ.en: Learned of an illegal act by the company and disclosed that information on the bulletin board of a website operated by a third party.

エ.zh: 未经本人许可，将他人用于网络访问的 ID 和密码告知了无访问权限的第三方。
エ.en: Told a third party without access rights another person's network access ID and password, without the person's permission.

2013h25a-q028.stem_jp_clean: IT統制は, ITに係る全般統制や業務処理統制などに分類される。全般統制はそれぞれの業務処理統制が有効に機能する環境を保証する統制活動のことをいい, 業務処理統制は業務を管理するシステムにおいて承認された業務が全て正確に処理, 記録されることを確保するための統制活動のことをいう。統制活動に関する記述のうち, 業務処理統制に当たるものはどれか。

stem.zh: IT控制可分为与IT相关的整体控制（全般控制）和业务处理控制等。整体控制是指保证各项业务处理控制能够有效发挥作用的环境的控制活动；业务处理控制是指为确保在管理业务的系统中所有经过批准的业务都被准确处理和记录而进行的控制活动。在以下关于控制活动的描述中，属于业务处理控制的是哪一项？
stem.en: IT controls are classified into general controls and application (business processing) controls related to IT. General controls are control activities that ensure the environment in which each application control functions effectively; application controls are control activities that ensure all approved transactions are accurately processed and recorded in the system that manages the operations. Among the following descriptions of control activities, which one corresponds to an application control?

ア.zh: 由统管外部委托的部门对外部委托方进行的监控
ア.en: Monitoring of outsourcing contractors by the department that oversees outsourcing

イ.zh: 与骨干网络相关的系统运行管理
イ.en: System operations management for the backbone network

ウ.zh: 按人事系统的各项功能限定使用者的访问管理机制

エ.zh: 全公司范围的系统开发与维护规程
エ.en: Company-wide system development and maintenance regulations

stem.zh: 关于服务台的说明，恰当的是哪一项？

ア.zh: 服务台必须是一种自动应答的机制。

ウ.zh: 通过电子邮件或电话受理有关系统操作方法等的咨询。

エ.zh: 可以分为接听订购等来电的呼入（inbound）和拨打销售等去电的呼出（outbound）。
エ.en: It can be classified into inbound, which receives calls such as orders, and outbound, which makes calls such as sales calls.

stem.zh: 关于在系统测试中实施的工作，下列说明中恰当的是哪一项？

ア.zh: 修复检出的缺陷后，只重新执行检出该缺陷的那个测试用例。
ア.en: After fixing a detected bug, redo only the test case that detected the bug.

イ.zh: 优先进行输入正常值时的测试，省略输入超出范围的值或必填项未输入时的测试。
イ.en: Prioritize testing with valid input values, and omit testing with out-of-range input values or with required fields left empty.

ウ.zh: 不仅依据设计书的规格，还要理解程序的代码，一边修正缺陷一边进行测试。
ウ.en: Test not only based on the specifications in the design document, but also by understanding the program code and fixing defects while testing.

エ.zh: 不仅测试软件的功能性，还要测试性能等非功能性需求。
エ.en: Test not only the functional aspects of the software, but also non-functional requirements such as performance.

イ.zh: 不遗漏也不冗余地梳理出项目成功所必需的各项工作。

ウ.zh: 在项目的启动、计划、执行、收尾等生命周期中，针对变更请求对成本与工期进行调整。
ウ.en: Throughout the project life cycle of initiation, planning, execution, and closing, adjust cost and duration in response to change requests.

エ.zh: 根据项目最初的预算和进展状况进行管理，使费用控制在预算之内。

2013h25a-q052.stem_jp_clean:
図1のように稼働率0.9の装置Aを2台並列に接続し、稼働率0.8の装置Bをその後に直列に接続したシステムがある。このシステムを図2のように装置Aを1台にした場合、システムの稼働率は図1の場合に比べて幾ら低下するか。図1の装置Aはどちらか一方が稼働していれば正常稼働とする。
なお、稼働率は小数第3位を四捨五入した値とする。

stem.zh:
如图1所示，将两台可用率为0.9的装置A并联连接，再在其后串联连接一台可用率为0.8的装置B，构成一个系统。当如图2所示将装置A改为一台时，相比图1的情形，系统的可用率会下降多少？图1中的装置A只要任意一台在运行即视为正常运行。
另外，可用率取小数第3位四舍五入后的值。
stem.en:
As shown in Figure 1, two devices A each with an availability of 0.9 are connected in parallel, and then a device B with an availability of 0.8 is connected in series after them, forming a system. When the system is changed so that there is only one device A as shown in Figure 2, how much does the system's availability decrease compared with the case in Figure 1? In Figure 1, device A is regarded as operating normally as long as either one of the two is running.
Note that the availability is the value rounded to two decimal places (the third decimal place is rounded off).

エ.en: Graphics memory

2013h25a-q054.stem_jp_clean: “男性のうち, 20歳未満の人と65歳以上の人” に関する情報を検索するための検索式として, 適切なものはどれか。

stem.zh: 为检索“男性当中，未满20岁的人和65岁及以上的人”的相关信息，下列哪个检索式是恰当的？
stem.en: Which of the following search expressions is appropriate for retrieving information about "males who are under 20 years old and 65 years old and over"?

ア.zh: 男性 AND（未满20岁 AND 65岁及以上）
ア.en: Male AND (under 20 years old AND 65 years old and over)

イ.zh: 男性 AND（未满20岁 OR 65岁及以上）

エ.en: Male OR (under 20 years old OR 65 years old and over)

stem.zh: 程序的执行方式有解释器方式和编译器方式两种。下图展示了一个输入数据并输出结果的程序，分别在这两种方式下的程序执行情形。填入 a、b 的字句的恰当组合是哪一个？
stem.en: There are two ways to execute a program: the interpreter method and the compiler method. The figure shows how a program that takes data as input and outputs a result is executed under each of these methods. Which is the appropriate combination of terms to put in a and b?

ウ.zh: a: 编译器 / b: 解释器
ウ.en: a: Compiler / b: Interpreter

エ.zh: a: 编译器 / b: 编译器
エ.en: a: Compiler / b: Compiler

2013h25a-q056.stem_jp_clean: リスクマネジメントに含まれる四つのプロセスであるリスク対応, リスク特定, リスク評価, リスク分析を実施する順番として, 適切なものはどれか。

stem.zh: 在风险管理所包含的四个过程中，将风险应对、风险识别、风险评价、风险分析按实施顺序排列，正确的是哪一项？
stem.en: Risk management includes four processes: risk treatment, risk identification, risk evaluation, and risk analysis. Which is the correct order in which to carry them out?

ア.zh: 风险识别→风险评价→风险分析→风险应对
ア.en: Risk identification → Risk evaluation → Risk analysis → Risk treatment

イ.zh: 风险识别→风险分析→风险评价→风险应对
イ.en: Risk identification → Risk analysis → Risk evaluation → Risk treatment

ウ.zh: 风险评价→风险识别→风险分析→风险应对
ウ.en: Risk evaluation → Risk identification → Risk analysis → Risk treatment

エ.zh: 风险分析→风险识别→风险应对→风险评价
エ.en: Risk analysis → Risk identification → Risk treatment → Risk evaluation

2013h25a-q057.stem_jp_clean: ISMS を運用している組織において, 退職者が利用していた ID を月末にまとめて削除していたことについて, 監査で指摘を受けた。これを是正して退職の都度削除するように改めるのは, ISMS の PDCA サイクルのどれに該当するか。

stem.zh: 在运行 ISMS（信息安全管理体系）的组织中，将离职者曾使用的 ID 集中到月末统一删除这一做法，在审计中被指出问题。为纠正此问题，改为在每次有人离职时即时删除，这属于 ISMS 的 PDCA 循环中的哪一项？
stem.en: In an organization operating an ISMS (Information Security Management System), an audit pointed out that the IDs formerly used by people who had left were being deleted all together at the end of each month. Correcting this so that each ID is deleted whenever the person leaves corresponds to which phase of the ISMS PDCA cycle?

ア.zh: P
ア.en: P

イ.zh: D
イ.en: D

ウ.zh: C
ウ.en: C

エ.zh: A
エ.en: A

stem.en: What is the use of the open source software known as Apache?

ア.zh: 数据库管理系统(DBMS)
ア.en: DBMS

イ.zh: 操作系统(OS)
イ.en: OS

ウ.zh: Web 服务器软件

ア.zh: CSV
ア.en: CSV

イ.zh: NAS
イ.en: NAS

ウ.zh: RAID
ウ.en: RAID

エ.zh: RSS
エ.en: RSS

2013h25a-q060.stem_jp_clean: AさんがBさんに署名付きメールを送信したい。S/MIME (Secure/Multipurpose Internet Mail Extensions) を利用して署名付きメールを送信する場合の条件のうち, 適切なものはどれか。

stem.zh: A 想向 B 发送带签名的邮件。使用 S/MIME (Secure/Multipurpose Internet Mail Extensions) 发送带签名的邮件时，下列条件中哪一项是恰当的？
stem.en: A wants to send a signed email to B. Which of the following is an appropriate condition for sending a signed email using S/MIME (Secure/Multipurpose Internet Mail Extensions)?

ア.zh: A 和 B 双方都需要事先取得自己的公开密钥证书（公钥证书）的颁发。
ア.en: Both A and B must obtain the issuance of their own public-key certificate in advance.

イ.zh: A 和 B 双方都需要属于同一个 ISP (Internet Service Provider)。
イ.en: Both A and B must belong to the same ISP (Internet Service Provider).

ウ.zh: A 所属的 ISP 需要支持 S/MIME。
ウ.en: The ISP that A belongs to must support S/MIME.

エ.zh: A 需要事先取得自己的公开密钥证书（公钥证书）的颁发，而 B 则无需如此。
エ.en: A must obtain the issuance of their own public-key certificate in advance, but B does not need to.

stem.zh: 在绘图（画图）类软件中使用、将图形作为称为像素的点的集合来处理的方法叫做光栅图形，关于光栅图形的说明，下列哪一项是恰当的？
stem.en: Raster graphics is a method used in paint software that treats graphics as a collection of dots called pixels. Which of the following descriptions of raster graphics is appropriate?

ア.zh: 在 CAD 中被广泛使用。
ア.en: It is widely used in CAD.

イ.zh: 颜色的种类和明暗可以逐个像素地调节。
イ.en: The type of color and brightness can be adjusted pixel by pixel.

ウ.zh: 无论分辨率高低，文件容量都是固定不变的。
ウ.en: The file size is constant regardless of whether the resolution is high or low.

エ.zh: 即使放大，图形的边缘等处也不会产生锯齿（毛刺）。
エ.en: Even when enlarged, jaggies (jagged edges) do not appear at the edges of shapes.

stem.zh: 关于宽带线路的特征，恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is an appropriate characteristic of a broadband line?

ア.zh: 通过使用 ADSL 调制解调器，即使在 CATV 网络中也能使用宽带互联网。
ア.en: By using an ADSL modem, broadband Internet can be used even over a CATV network.

イ.zh: 是适合传输视频等大容量数据通信的线路。
イ.en: It is a line suited for communication of large-volume data such as video.

ウ.zh: 由于多个用户共享宽带带宽，因此不适合持续在线连接。
ウ.en: Because multiple users share the wide bandwidth, it is not suited for always-on connection.

エ.zh: 宽带路由器仅用于光纤网络。
エ.en: Broadband routers are used only in optical fiber networks.

stem.zh: 关于 IPv6 的描述，恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is an appropriate description of IPv6?

ア.zh: 地址空间具有 128 位的大小，因此与 IPv4 相比可以分配更多的地址。
ア.en: Its address space is 128 bits in size, so it can assign more addresses than IPv4.

イ.zh: 无法在同一个 LAN 中让 IPv6 和 IPv4 共存。
イ.en: IPv6 and IPv4 cannot coexist on a single LAN.

ウ.zh: 它是有线 LAN 专用的协议，因此无法在无线 LAN 中使用。
ウ.en: It is a protocol exclusively for wired LANs, so it cannot be used on wireless LANs.

エ.zh: 使用时需要光纤电缆，而非普通的双绞线电缆。
エ.en: Its use requires fiber-optic cable rather than ordinary twisted-pair cable.

stem.zh: 下面的真值表给出了对应于输入 x、y 的输出 z。能得到该结果的逻辑运算式是哪一个？
stem.en: Which logical operation expression yields the output z for the inputs x and y shown in the following truth table?

ア.zh: x AND y
ア.en: x AND y

イ.zh: NOT(x AND y)
イ.en: NOT(x AND y)

ウ.zh: NOT(x OR y)
ウ.en: NOT(x OR y)

エ.zh: x OR y
エ.en: x OR y

stem.zh: 关于通信协议的说明，恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following descriptions of communication protocols is appropriate?

ア.zh: DHCP 是用于浏览 Web 的协议。
ア.en: DHCP is a protocol for Web browsing.

イ.zh: FTP 是用于文件传输的协议。
イ.en: FTP is a protocol for file transfer.

ウ.zh: NTP 是从服务器获取要设置的 IP 地址等信息的协议。
ウ.en: NTP is a protocol that obtains information such as the IP address to be configured from a server.

エ.zh: POP 是邮件客户端用于发送邮件的协议。
エ.en: POP is a protocol used by a mail client to send mail.

stem.zh: 关于多核处理器的描述，最恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is the most appropriate description of a multi-core processor?

ア.zh: 在一台 PC 中搭载多个微处理器，各处理器同时执行相同的处理，以提高处理结果的可靠性为目的。
ア.en: It mounts multiple microprocessors in a single PC, with each processor simultaneously executing the same processing, aiming to improve the reliability of the processing results.

イ.zh: 若运算装置的结构和时钟频率相同，则四核处理器拥有双核处理器 4 倍的处理能力。
イ.en: If the structure of the arithmetic unit and the clock frequency are the same, a quad-core processor has four times the processing capacity of a dual-core processor.

ウ.zh: 根据处理负载临时提高时钟频率，用多个核心实现高速处理。
ウ.en: It temporarily raises the clock frequency according to the processing load, achieving high-speed processing with multiple cores.

エ.zh: 在一个 CPU 内拥有多个执行运算等操作的处理电路，各自同时执行不同的处理，以提高处理能力为目的。
エ.en: It has multiple processing circuits performing computation and other operations within a single CPU, each simultaneously executing different processing, aiming to improve processing capacity.

2013h25a-q067.stem_jp_clean: あるトランザクション処理は, ①共有領域から値を読み取り, ②読み取った値に数値を加算し, ③結果を共有領域に書き込む手順からなっている。複数のトランザクションを並列に矛盾なく処理するためには, トランザクション処理のどの時点で共有領域をロックし, どの時点でロックを解除するのが適切か。

stem.zh: 某事务处理由以下步骤组成：①从共享区域读取值，②将数值加到读取的值上，③将结果写回共享区域。为了使多个事务能够并行且不产生冲突地处理，在事务处理的哪个时点对共享区域加锁、在哪个时点解锁才合适？
stem.en: A transaction consists of the following steps: (1) read a value from a shared area, (2) add a number to the value that was read, and (3) write the result back to the shared area. To process multiple transactions in parallel without inconsistency, at which point should the shared area be locked, and at which point should the lock be released?

ア.zh: 共享区域加锁—时点(a)，解锁—时点(c)
ア.en: Lock the shared area at point (a); release the lock at point (c)

イ.zh: 共享区域加锁—时点(a)，解锁—时点(d)
イ.en: Lock the shared area at point (a); release the lock at point (d)

ウ.zh: 共享区域加锁—时点(b)，解锁—时点(c)
ウ.en: Lock the shared area at point (b); release the lock at point (c)

エ.zh: 共享区域加锁—时点(b)，解锁—时点(d)
エ.en: Lock the shared area at point (b); release the lock at point (d)

2013h25a-q068.stem_jp_clean:
パケット交換方式に関する記述のうち, 適切なものだけを全て挙げたものはどれか。
a インターネットにおける通信で使われている方式である。
b 通信相手との通信経路を占有するので, 帯域保証が必要な通信サービスに向いている。
c 通信量は, 実際に送受信したパケットの数やそのサイズを基にして算出される。
d パケットのサイズを超える動画などの大容量データ通信には利用できない。

stem.zh:
关于分组交换方式的描述中, 仅列举出所有恰当项的是哪一个?
a 它是互联网通信中所采用的方式。
b 由于会独占与通信对方之间的通信路径, 因此适合需要带宽保证的通信服务。
c 通信量是根据实际收发的分组数量及其大小来计算的。
d 无法用于视频等超过分组大小的大容量数据通信。
stem.en:
Among the descriptions about the packet switching method, which one lists only all of the appropriate items?
a It is the method used for communication on the Internet.
b Because it occupies the communication path with the communication partner, it is suitable for communication services that require bandwidth guarantees.
c The traffic volume is calculated based on the number of packets actually sent and received and their sizes.
d It cannot be used for large-capacity data communication such as videos that exceed the packet size.

ア.zh: a，b，c
ア.en: a, b, c

イ.zh: a，b，d
イ.en: a, b, d

ウ.zh: a，c
ウ.en: a, c

エ.zh: b，d
エ.en: b, d

stem.zh: 关于 RSS 的说明，哪一项是恰当的？
stem.en: Which of the following is an appropriate description of RSS?

ア.zh: 它是一种使网站的色调和设计具有统一性的机制。
ア.en: It is a mechanism for giving consistency to the color scheme and design of a website.

イ.zh: 它是一种用于描述网站标题、摘要等内容的格式，用于发布网站的更新信息。
イ.en: It is a format for describing the headlines and summaries of a website, and is used to publish a website's update information.

ウ.zh: 它是一种在网页中嵌入小图像，以收集用户访问动向信息的机制。
ウ.en: It is a mechanism that embeds a small image in a web page to collect information about users' access trends.

エ.zh: 它是一种设计理念，旨在提供无论年龄、文化、有无障碍，都能让众多人舒适使用的 Web 环境。
エ.en: It is a design philosophy that aims to provide a web environment many people can use comfortably regardless of age, culture, or disability.

2013h25a-q070.stem_jp_clean: OS に関する記述のうち, 適切なものはどれか。

stem.zh: 关于操作系统(OS)的描述中，正确的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following statements about an OS is appropriate?

ア.zh: 可以在一台 PC 上安装多个操作系统(OS)，并在启动时选择要使用的操作系统。
ア.en: Multiple OSs can be installed on a single PC, and the OS can be selected at startup.

イ.zh: 操作系统(OS)是用于启动 PC 的应用程序，PC 启动之后 OS 便停止运行。
イ.en: An OS is an application program for starting up a PC, and after the PC has started, the OS stops functioning.

ウ.zh: 操作系统(OS)必须具有图形化界面，所有操作都通过该界面进行。
ウ.en: An OS must have a graphical interface, and all operations are performed through that interface.

エ.zh: 操作系统(OS)只能从硬盘驱动器启动。
エ.en: An OS can only be started from a hard disk drive.

stem.zh: 关于 WAN（广域网）的描述，最恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is the most appropriate description of a WAN?

ア.zh: 如 ADSL、光纤等，用于数据通信的频带较宽，可以进行高速通信。
ア.en: Such as ADSL and optical fiber, it uses a wide frequency band for data communication and enables high-speed communication.

イ.zh: 各种信息终端和设备通过有线或无线的多样化网络相互连接，可以随时随地使用各种服务。
イ.en: Various information terminals and devices are connected through diverse wired and wireless networks, allowing various services to be used anytime and anywhere.

ウ.zh: 使用电波代替线缆来进行构建。
ウ.en: It is built using radio waves instead of cables.

エ.zh: 利用通信运营商的网络服务，将总公司与分公司之间等地理上相距较远的多个局域网（LAN）互相连接起来。
エ.en: It uses a telecommunications carrier's network services to connect geographically distant LANs, such as those between a head office and a branch office.

2013h25a-q072.stem_jp_clean:
情報セキュリティ対策に関する記述 a〜c のうち，通信内容を暗号化することによって実現できることだけを全て挙げたものはどれか。
a 通信途中に改ざんされたデータを復旧する。
b 通信内容を第三者に知られないようにする。
c 盗聴された場合に，盗聴した者を特定する。

stem.zh:
关于信息安全对策的描述 a～c 中，仅列出通过对通信内容进行加密所能实现的事项，全部列举正确的是哪一项？
a 恢复在通信途中被篡改的数据。
b 使通信内容不被第三方知晓。
c 在被窃听时，确定窃听者的身份。
stem.en:
Among the descriptions a–c about information security measures, which option lists all and only the things that can be achieved by encrypting the communication content?
a Recover data that was tampered with during transmission.
b Prevent the communication content from being known by third parties.
c Identify the eavesdropper when communication is intercepted.

ア.zh: a
ア.en: a

イ.zh: a，b
イ.en: a, b

ウ.zh: a，c
ウ.en: a, c

エ.zh: b
エ.en: b

stem.zh: 关于 Web 通信中使用的 HTTPS 的说明，正确的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is a correct description of HTTPS, which is used in Web communication?

ア.zh: 这是一种将 HTTP 通信双重化以提高可用性的协议。
ア.en: It is a protocol that duplicates HTTP communication to improve availability.

イ.zh: 这是一种相比 HTTP 简化了通信步骤的协议。
イ.en: It is a protocol that simplifies the communication procedure compared with HTTP.

ウ.zh: 这是一种使用 SSL 对通信内容进行加密的协议。
ウ.en: It is a protocol that uses SSL to encrypt the content of communication.

エ.zh: 这是一种用于保证基于 Web 的商业交易成立的协议。
エ.en: It is a protocol that guarantees the conclusion of commercial transactions conducted over the Web.

stem.zh: 关于零日攻击的说明，恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is an appropriate description of a zero-day attack?

ア.zh: 依次改变 TCP/IP 协议的端口号来访问服务器，调查是否存在可能成为入侵入口的脆弱端口的攻击。
ア.en: An attack that accesses a server while changing the TCP/IP protocol port numbers one after another, to check whether there is any vulnerable port that could serve as an entry point for intrusion.

イ.zh: 通过巧妙的话术或偷窥等手段，从系统管理员或用户那里获取密码等安全上重要的信息，冒充用户侵入系统的攻击。
イ.en: An attack that obtains security-critical information such as passwords from system administrators or users through clever conversation techniques or shoulder surfing, and then intrudes into the system by impersonating a legitimate user.

ウ.zh: 在发现软件存在脆弱性时，趁该软件的修正程序由供应商提供之前，利用已发现的脆弱性进行的攻击。
ウ.en: An attack carried out by exploiting a discovered vulnerability in software before the vendor provides a patch (fix program) for it, after the vulnerability has been found.

エ.zh: 为了破解密码或解密密文，将字典中的单词混用大小写或加入数字来生成字符串，然后逐一胡乱尝试的攻击。
エ.en: An attack that, in order to crack passwords or decrypt ciphertext, generates strings by mixing uppercase and lowercase letters or adding numbers to dictionary words, and then tries them one after another at random.

stem.zh: 下列哪一项能够直接提高信息安全的机密性？
stem.en: Which of the following directly enhances the confidentiality of information security?

ア.zh: 在每天业务结束时获取机密信息文件的操作日志，确认没有泄露的痕迹。
ア.en: At the end of each day's work, obtain the operation logs of confidential information files and confirm that there is no trace of leakage.

イ.zh: 在访问机密信息文件时，确认上次的访问日期是否正确。
イ.en: When accessing a confidential information file, confirm whether the date of the previous access is correct.

ウ.zh: 对机密信息文件进行备份，使得即使信息被破坏或篡改也能从备份中恢复。
ウ.en: Make backups of confidential information files so that, even if the information is destroyed or tampered with, it can be restored from the backup.

エ.zh: 对机密信息文件进行加密，使得即使泄露也无法被解读。
エ.en: Encrypt confidential information files so that, even if they are leaked, they cannot be deciphered.

stem.zh: 当用 2 个字节表示 1 个字符时，最多可以表示多少种字符？
stem.en: When 1 character is represented by 2 bytes, how many kinds of characters can be represented at most?

stem.zh: 关于恶意软件（malware）的说明，哪一项是恰当的？
stem.en: Which of the following is an appropriate description of malware?

ア.zh: 从互联网检测对内部网络非法入侵的机制
ア.en: A mechanism for detecting unauthorized intrusion from the Internet into an internal network

イ.zh: 包括计算机病毒、蠕虫等在内的恶意软件的总称
イ.en: A general term for malicious software, including computer viruses, worms, and the like

ウ.zh: 通过网络在计算机之间进行文件共享的软件的总称
ウ.en: A general term for software that performs file sharing between computers over a network

エ.zh: 通过话术、偷听等手段窃取公司内部信息的行为
エ.en: The act of stealing internal company information through conversational techniques, eavesdropping, and the like

stem.zh: 关于扫描仪的说明，哪一项是恰当的？
stem.en: Which of the following is an appropriate description of a scanner?

ア.zh: 通过扫描纸面来读取图像，并将其转换为数字数据。
ア.en: It scans a paper surface to read an image and converts it into digital data.

イ.zh: 通过底面的发光器和受光器读取移动的量、方向和速度。
イ.en: It reads the amount, direction, and speed of movement using a light emitter and a light receiver on its underside.

ウ.zh: 使用笔形器具在板面上输入位置。
ウ.en: It uses a pen-shaped tool to input a position on a board surface.

エ.zh: 通过用手指触碰来输入屏幕上的位置。
エ.en: It inputs a position on the screen by touching it with a finger.

2013h25a-q079.stem_jp_clean: 企業内ネットワークからも, 外部ネットワークからも論理的に隔離されたネットワーク領域であり, そこに設置されたサーバが外部から不正アクセスを受けたとしても, 企業内ネットワークには被害が及ばないようにするためのものはどれか。

stem.zh: 一种在逻辑上既与企业内部网络隔离、又与外部网络隔离的网络区域，即使设置在该区域内的服务器遭到来自外部的非法访问，也不会波及企业内部网络。符合此描述的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following refers to a network area that is logically isolated from both the internal corporate network and the external network, so that even if a server placed in it is subjected to unauthorized access from outside, the damage does not reach the internal corporate network?

ア.zh: DMZ（隔离区）
ア.en: DMZ

イ.zh: DNS
イ.en: DNS

ウ.zh: DoS
ウ.en: DoS

エ.zh: SSL
エ.en: SSL

2013h25a-q080.stem_jp_clean: Web ページの作成・編集において, Web サイト全体の色調やデザインに統一性をもたせたい場合, HTML と組み合わせて利用すると効果的なものはどれか。

stem.zh: 在制作和编辑网页时，若希望让整个网站的色调和设计保持统一性，与 HTML 组合使用会比较有效的是哪一个？
stem.en: When creating and editing web pages, if you want to give a unified color scheme and design to the entire website, which is effective to use in combination with HTML?

ア.zh: CSS（层叠样式表，Cascading Style Sheets）
ア.en: CSS (Cascading Style Sheets)

2013h25a-q081.stem_jp_clean: 無線LAN のセキュリティにおいて, アクセスポイントが接続要求を受け取ったときに, 端末固有の情報を基にアクセス制御を行う仕組みはどれか。

stem.zh: 在无线 LAN 的安全机制中，当接入点收到连接请求时，依据终端固有的信息进行访问控制的机制是哪一个？
stem.en: In wireless LAN security, which mechanism performs access control based on information unique to a terminal when an access point receives a connection request?

ア.zh: ESSID
ア.en: ESSID

イ.zh: MAC 地址过滤
イ.en: MAC address filtering

ウ.zh: WEP
ウ.en: WEP

エ.zh: WPA
エ.en: WPA

2013h25a-q082.stem_jp_clean: PC に接続された周辺機器を, アプリケーションプログラムから利用するために必要なものはどれか。

stem.zh: 要从应用程序中使用连接到 PC 的外围设备，需要的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is required in order to use a peripheral device connected to a PC from an application program?

ア.zh: 编译器
ア.en: Compiler

イ.zh: 设备驱动程序
イ.en: Device driver

ウ.zh: 即插即用
ウ.en: Plug and Play

エ.en: Hot plug

stem.zh: 作为防止感染机器人程序（Bot）的对策，不恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is NOT an appropriate measure to prevent bot infection?

ア.zh: 安装杀毒软件。
ア.en: Install antivirus software.

イ.zh: 对硬盘进行加密。
イ.en: Encrypt the hard disk.

ウ.zh: 避免浏览可疑的网站。
ウ.en: Refrain from browsing suspicious websites.

エ.zh: 不要轻易打开来自陌生发件人的电子邮件附件。
エ.en: Do not casually open email attachments from unknown senders.

stem.zh: PLC 适配器的作用，以下哪项是适当的？
stem.en: Which of the following is an appropriate role of a PLC adapter?

ア.zh: 为了将 PC、模拟电话等无法直接连接到 ISDN 线路的通信设备接入 ISDN 线路，进行信号转换。
ア.en: Performs signal conversion to connect communication devices that cannot directly connect to an ISDN line, such as PCs and analog telephones, to the ISDN line.

イ.zh: 在连接到 Web 网站或文件服务器等时，进行主机名与 IP 地址之间的转换。
イ.en: Converts between host names and IP addresses when connecting to websites, file servers, and the like.

ウ.zh: 在使用模拟电话线路进行高速通信时，利用电话未使用的频段来收发通信用信号。
ウ.en: When performing high-speed communication using an analog telephone line, sends and receives communication signals using frequency bands not used by telephony.

エ.zh: 在使用室内电力配线构建 LAN 时，进行电力与通信用信号的叠加或分离。
エ.en: When building a LAN using indoor electrical power wiring, superimposes or separates electric power and communication signals.

stem.zh: N公司内部的某项目，全体成员相互沟通推进工作，各成员之间需要进行一对一的信息传递。这种进行一对一信息传递的路径称为沟通渠道。在A加入之前，沟通渠道的总数为6。A加入之后，沟通渠道的总数，正确的是哪一项？
stem.en: In a project within Company N, all members proceed while communicating with one another, and each member must transmit information one-to-one with every other member. This one-to-one information-transmission path is called a communication channel. Before person A joined, the total number of communication channels was 6. After person A joins, which of the following is the correct total number of communication channels?

stem.zh: N公司与报价委托对象B公司和C公司签订保密协议的理由，最恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is the appropriate reason why Company N concluded confidentiality (non-disclosure) agreements with Company B and Company C, the recipients of its quotation requests?

ア.zh: 为了禁止外部采购方将与N公司签约的业务再次转包给他人。
ア.en: To prohibit the external suppliers from subcontracting the work they contracted with Company N.

イ.zh: 为了确保外部采购方的员工切实服从N公司项目成员的指挥命令。
イ.en: To ensure that the external suppliers' employees reliably follow the instructions and orders given by Company N's project members.

ウ.zh: 为了保护N公司在软件方面的著作权。
ウ.en: To protect Company N's copyright concerning the software.

エ.zh: 为了防止为编制报价单而提供给B公司、C公司的信息，经由其中任何一方泄露到外部。
エ.en: To prevent the information given to Company B and Company C for preparing the quotations from leaking outside through either of them.

2013h25a-q087.stem_jp_clean:
N 社と B 社は, ソフトウェア開発の期間短縮を実現するために, 締結している請負契約の変更に合意し, 6月末に請負契約の変更契約を締結した。このとき, 最初の請負契約から変更になった項目の組合せはどれか。
① 契約金額 ② 商品仕様 ③ 納期 ④ 納入物

stem.zh:
N 公司与 B 公司为了缩短软件开发周期，就已签订的承包合同的变更达成一致，于 6 月底签订了承包合同的变更合同。此时，相对于最初的承包合同发生变更的项目组合是哪一个？
① 合同金额 ② 商品规格 ③ 交付期 ④ 交付物
stem.en:
Company N and Company B, in order to shorten the software development period, agreed to modify the contract-for-work they had concluded, and at the end of June they signed a modification contract for the contract-for-work. In this case, which combination shows the items that were changed from the original contract-for-work?
(1) Contract amount  (2) Product specifications  (3) Delivery deadline  (4) Deliverables

ア.zh: ① 和 ②

イ.zh: ① 和 ③

ウ.zh: ② 和 ④

エ.zh: ③ 和 ④

stem.zh: N 公司从 7 月 1 日起，按照图 1 甘特图的变更计划开始进行工序管理。在该变更计划中，能够使项目整体工期缩短 1 个月的对策说明，恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Starting on July 1, Company N began process management according to the modified plan shown in the Gantt chart of Figure 1. Among the descriptions of measures that make it possible to shorten the overall project duration by one month under this modified plan, which one is appropriate?

ア.zh: 将 B 公司的软件开发工作缩短 0.5 个月，并将验收测试·验收提前 0.5 个月。
ア.en: Shorten Company B's software development work by 0.5 months, and move up the acceptance testing and acceptance inspection by 0.5 months.

イ.zh: 将 B 公司的软件开发工作缩短 0.5 个月，并将验收测试·验收提前 0.5 个月；同时，将流通计划·促销业务的开始时间提前，使其与 B 公司的软件开发工作并行作业 0.5 个月。
イ.en: Shorten Company B's software development work by 0.5 months and move up the acceptance testing and acceptance inspection by 0.5 months; in addition, move up the start of the distribution planning and promotion work so that it runs in parallel with Company B's software development work for 0.5 months.

ウ.zh: 将 B 公司的软件开发工作缩短 1 个月。
ウ.en: Shorten Company B's software development work by one month.

エ.zh: 将流通计划·促销业务的开始时间提前，使其与 B 公司的软件开发工作并行作业 1 个月。
エ.en: Move up the start of the distribution planning and promotion work so that it runs in parallel with Company B's software development work for one month.

2013h25a-q089.stem_jp_clean: M さんが担当することになった “事務担当者の残業増加” に該当する損益計算書の勘定科目の分類として, 適切なものはどれか。

stem.zh: M 先生负责处理的“行政事务人员加班时间增加”这一项，应归类为损益表中的哪一个会计科目？请选择最恰当的一项。
stem.en: Which classification of accounts in the income statement does the "increase in overtime of administrative staff" that Mr. M came to be in charge of correspond to? Choose the most appropriate one.

ア.zh: 营业成本
ア.en: Cost of sales

イ.zh: 营业外费用
イ.en: Non-operating expenses

ウ.zh: 特别损失
ウ.en: Extraordinary loss

エ.zh: 销售费用及一般管理费用
エ.en: Selling, general and administrative expenses

2013h25a-q090.stem_jp_clean:
M さんは, 改善策を検討する前に〔業務改善の企画書作成に関する上司からの指示〕の(1)に基づいて, 発生している問題とその原因との関係を論理的に整理した。
発生している問題とその原因との関係を〔事務担当者へのインタビュー結果メモ〕から整理したものとして, 適切なものはどれか。
なお, (a) → (b) という記述は, (a)が原因となって(b)という問題が発生したという関係を表している。

stem.zh:
M 在研究改善对策之前，依据〔上司关于编写业务改善企划书的指示〕中的第(1)项，对所发生的问题与其原因之间的关系进行了逻辑梳理。
根据〔对事务负责人的访谈结果备忘录〕来整理所发生的问题与其原因之间的关系，下列哪一项是恰当的？
此外，(a) → (b) 这种记述表示：(a) 是原因，由它导致了 (b) 这一问题的发生。
stem.en:
Before considering improvement measures, Mr. M logically organized the relationships between the problems that are occurring and their causes, based on item (1) of [the supervisor's instructions on creating a business improvement proposal].
Which of the following correctly organizes the relationships between the occurring problems and their causes, based on [the memo of the interview results with the office staff]?
Note that the notation (a) -> (b) represents the relationship in which (a) is the cause and it led to the problem (b) occurring.

ア.zh: 投诉的发生 → 误发货的发生 → 加班的增加
ア.en: Occurrence of complaints -> Occurrence of mis-shipments -> Increase in overtime

イ.zh: 误发货的发生 → 投诉的发生 → 加班的增加
イ.en: Occurrence of mis-shipments -> Occurrence of complaints -> Increase in overtime

ウ.zh: 误发货的发生 → 加班的增加 → 投诉的发生
ウ.en: Occurrence of mis-shipments -> Increase in overtime -> Occurrence of complaints

エ.zh: 加班的增加 → 投诉的发生 → 误发货的发生
エ.en: Increase in overtime -> Occurrence of complaints -> Occurrence of mis-shipments

2013h25a-q091.stem_jp_clean: M さんは, 〔業務改善の企画書作成に関する上司からの指示〕の(2)に基づいて, 業務改善の観点を廃止 (Eliminate), 統合 (Combine), 置換え (Rearrange), 簡素化 (Simplify) とし, 改善のためのアイデアを複数作成した。〔関係者への追加インタビュー結果メモ〕にある「掲載されている写真が違っている」に対して, 簡素化の観点から立案されたアイデアとして, 最も適切なものはどれか。

stem.zh: M 先生根据〔上司关于编写业务改善企划书的指示〕中的(2)，将业务改善的视角设定为废除(Eliminate)、整合(Combine)、调换(Rearrange)、简化(Simplify)，并据此创建了多个改善方案。针对〔对相关人员的追加访谈结果备忘〕中记载的"刊登的照片有误"这一问题，从简化视角提出的方案中，最恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Based on item (2) of the [supervisor's instructions on creating a business-improvement proposal], Mr. M set the perspectives for business improvement as Eliminate, Combine, Rearrange, and Simplify, and created several improvement ideas. Regarding the issue "the posted photo is wrong" noted in the [memo of additional interview results with stakeholders], which of the following is the most appropriate idea proposed from the Simplify perspective?

ア.zh: 停止刊登照片。
ア.en: Stop posting photos.

イ.zh: 缩减每件商品所刊登照片的数量。
イ.en: Narrow down the number of posted photos per product.

ウ.zh: 由系统检查登记的内容。
ウ.en: Have the system check the registered content.

エ.zh: 由资深负责人集中地通过肉眼检查登记的内容。
エ.en: Have a veteran staff member visually check the registered content in a batch.

stem.zh:
〔战略〕
问92 W先生针对多个创意，按各评价轴以5分满分进行了评价。在相关人员之间反复研讨后得到的最终评价结果如表1所示，根据〔关于编写业务改善企划书的上司指示〕的第(3)项，能够获得最佳评价的方案是哪一个？

表1 最终评价结果

| 方案 | 效果注1) | 费用 | 实行 |
|---|---|---|---|
| 方案1：取消刊登照片 | 1 | 5 | 5 |
| 方案2：缩减每件商品刊登的照片数量 | 2 | 5 | 3 |
| 方案3：由系统检查登记内容 | 5 | 1 | 1 |
| 方案4：由资深负责人对登记内容统一进行目视检查 | 4 | 4 | 2 |

注1) 效果是从抑制投诉发生的效果与扩大Web销售的效果两方面进行评价的。

〔评价基准〕

效果（效果的大小）：5（大）～ 1（小）
费用（费用的小）：5（小）～ 1（大）
实行（实行的容易程度）：5（容易）～ 1（困难）
stem.en:
[Strategy]
Q92 Mr. W evaluated multiple ideas, scoring each on a 5-point scale for every evaluation axis. The final evaluation results, reached after repeated discussions among the people involved, are shown in Table 1. Based on item (3) of [the supervisor's instructions on preparing the business improvement proposal], which option receives the best evaluation?

Table 1 Final evaluation results

| Option | Effect Note 1) | Cost | Implementation |
|---|---|---|---|
| Option 1: Stop posting photos | 1 | 5 | 5 |
| Option 2: Narrow down the number of photos posted per product | 2 | 5 | 3 |
| Option 3: Have the system check the registered content | 5 | 1 | 1 |
| Option 4: Have a veteran staff member visually check the registered content in bulk | 4 | 4 | 2 |

Note 1) Effect was evaluated from two aspects: the effect of curbing complaints and the effect of expanding Web sales.

[Evaluation criteria]

Effect (magnitude of effect): 5 (large) to 1 (small)
Cost (smallness of cost): 5 (small) to 1 (large)
Implementation (ease of implementation): 5 (easy) to 1 (difficult)

ア.en: Option 1

2013h25a-q097.stem_jp_clean:
B さんは, RFID を内蔵した利用者カードを発行し, 書籍にはシート状に加工した RFID を貼り, RFID 読取装置をカウンタに設置し, 貸出, 返却時に利用することを検討した。これで改善できる〔要望事項〕として, 適切なものはどれか。

〔要望事項〕
(1) 利用者カードの利用者番号及び書籍の識別番号をバーコードリーダで個々に読み取っているので, 貸出業務が集中する時間帯には, 利用者が貸出のカウンタに並んでしまう。貸出担当は, 作業を手早く処理したい。
(2) 書籍棚から取り出した書籍を, 利用者が元の場所に戻さないことがある。定期的に, 棚と書籍をチェックしながら整理するが, この作業の時間を短くしたい。
(3) 返却担当は貸出予約されている書籍が返却されれば取り置きし, 予約をした利用者に電話で連絡をする。何度電話しても連絡が取れないことがあるので, 連絡の手間を軽減したい。
(4) 書籍の返却は, 図書館の入口にある返却ポストでも受け付けている。返却業務が滞ると, 図書館システム上で書籍が貸出中になっている時間が増加する。利用者の利便性向上のために, 返却ポストに入っている書籍を把握したい。

stem.zh:
B 先生计划：发行内置 RFID 的用户卡，在书籍上粘贴加工成薄片状的 RFID，并在柜台设置 RFID 读取装置，在借出、归还时使用。该方案能够改善的〔需求事项〕中，恰当的是哪一项？

〔需求事项〕
(1) 由于用户卡的用户编号及书籍的识别编号是用条形码阅读器逐个读取的，在借出业务集中的时间段，用户会在借出柜台排起长队。借出负责人希望能够快速处理这项作业。
(2) 用户有时不会把从书架上取出的书籍放回原来的位置。虽然会定期一边核对书架与书籍一边整理，但希望缩短这项作业的时间。
(3) 归还负责人在被预约借出的书籍归还后会将其留存，并打电话通知预约的用户。由于多次打电话也有联系不上的情况，希望减轻联络的工作量。
(4) 书籍的归还也在图书馆入口处的归还箱受理。归还业务一旦滞后，在图书馆系统上书籍处于借出中状态的时间就会增加。为提升用户的便利性，希望掌握归还箱中存放的书籍。
stem.en:
Mr. B considered the following plan: issue user cards with built-in RFID, attach sheet-form RFID to books, install RFID readers at the counter, and use them when lending and returning books. Which of the following requirements can be improved by this plan?

[Requirements]
(1) Because the user number on the user card and the identification number of each book are read individually with a barcode reader, users line up at the lending counter during peak lending hours. The lending staff wants to process the work quickly.
(2) Users sometimes do not return books taken from the shelves to their original places. Although the shelves and books are periodically organized while being checked, the staff wants to shorten the time required for this work.
(3) When a book that has a lending reservation is returned, the return staff sets it aside and contacts the user who made the reservation by phone. Since the user sometimes cannot be reached even after repeated calls, the staff wants to reduce the effort spent on contacting users.
(4) Books can also be returned at the return box located at the library entrance. When return processing is delayed, the time during which books appear as on loan in the library system increases. To improve user convenience, the staff wants to keep track of the books placed in the return box.

ア.zh: (1) 在借出业务集中的时间段用户会在柜台排队，借出负责人希望快速处理借出作业。
ア.en: (1) Users line up at the counter during peak lending hours; the lending staff wants to process the lending work quickly.

イ.zh: (2) 用户不把书籍放回原位，希望缩短定期核对与整理书架、书籍的作业时间。
イ.en: (2) Users do not return books to their original places; the staff wants to shorten the time for periodically checking and organizing the shelves and books.

ウ.zh: (3) 被预约的书籍归还后需电话通知用户，但常联系不上，希望减轻联络的工作量。
ウ.en: (3) When a reserved book is returned, the user must be contacted by phone, but often cannot be reached; the staff wants to reduce the contact effort.

エ.zh: (4) 书籍也可在入口归还箱归还，归还业务滞后会使系统上显示为借出中的时间增加，为提升用户便利性，希望掌握归还箱中存放的书籍。
エ.en: (4) Books can also be returned at the entrance return box; when return processing is delayed, the time books appear as on loan in the system increases, so to improve user convenience the staff wants to keep track of the books in the return box.

2013h25a-q098.stem_jp_clean:
A図書館には数十万冊の蔵書があり, 新システムに移行するためには, シート状に加工したRFIDを全ての書籍に貼る必要がある。移行期間中は, 現在書籍に貼ってあるバーコードと新たに導入するRFIDを併用し, 業務を止めずに新システムにスムーズに移行するため, 貸出履歴を管理するためのファイル (テーブル) は現在のシステムのものをそのまま利用する方法を考えた。次の記述中のa, bに入れる字句の適切な組合せはどれか。
Bさんは, 新システムにスムーズに移行する方法を実施するために, 書籍の識別番号と, 利用者カードの利用者番号について, 次のようにすることにした。
書籍の識別番号 : a 。
利用者カードの利用者番号 : b 。

stem.zh:
A图书馆藏书有数十万册，为了迁移到新系统，需要在所有书籍上粘贴加工成片状的RFID。在迁移期间，并用现在贴在书籍上的条形码和新引入的RFID，为了不中断业务、平稳地迁移到新系统，考虑了让管理借阅履历的文件（表）直接沿用现有系统的方法。在下述描述中，填入a、b的字句的恰当组合是哪一个？
B先生为了实施平稳迁移到新系统的方法，决定对书籍的识别号和借阅者卡的借阅者号做如下处理。
书籍的识别号： a 。
借阅者卡的借阅者号： b 。
stem.en:
Library A has several hundred thousand books in its collection. To migrate to a new system, an RFID tag processed into sheet form must be attached to every book. During the migration period, the barcodes currently attached to books and the newly introduced RFID are used together, and in order to migrate smoothly to the new system without halting operations, a method was devised in which the file (table) for managing the lending history continues to use the one from the current system as-is. Which is the appropriate combination of words to put into a and b in the following description?
In order to carry out the method of smoothly migrating to the new system, Mr. B decided to handle the book identification number and the user number on the user card as follows.
Book identification number: a .
User number on the user card: b .

ア.zh: a-沿用现有的，b-沿用现有的
ア.en: a-Use the current one, b-Use the current one

イ.zh: a-沿用现有的，b-替换为新的号码
イ.en: a-Use the current one, b-Replace with a new number

ウ.zh: a-替换为新的号码，b-沿用现有的
ウ.en: a-Replace with a new number, b-Use the current one

エ.zh: a-替换为新的号码，b-替换为新的号码
エ.en: a-Replace with a new number, b-Replace with a new number

2013h25a-q099.stem_jp_clean:
B さんは【要望事項】を実現するために, 市販されている RFID を用いたシステムを調べ, 次の施策を考えた。
① RFID を内蔵した利用者カードを発行し, 書籍にはシート状に加工した RFID を貼り, 貸出, 返却時にカウンタで用いる RFID 読取装置を新たに導入する。
② 全ての書籍棚の棚板に RFID 読取装置を設置し, 書籍と書籍棚をチェックするシステムを導入する。
③ 返却ポストに RFID 読取装置を設置する。
B さんは, 施策①〜③による効果を整理した結果, これらの施策では実現できない要望事項があることに気づいた。【要望事項】のうち, 実現できない事項に該当するものとして, 適切なものはどれか。

stem.zh:
B 先生为了实现【需求事项】，调查了市售的使用 RFID（射频识别）的系统，并考虑了以下措施。
① 发行内置 RFID（射频识别）的用户卡，在书籍上粘贴加工成片状的 RFID（射频识别），并新引入在借出、归还时于柜台使用的 RFID（射频识别）读取装置。
② 在所有书架的隔板上安装 RFID（射频识别）读取装置，引入对书籍与书架进行核对的系统。
③ 在还书箱上安装 RFID（射频识别）读取装置。
B 先生整理措施①～③带来的效果后，发现存在这些措施无法实现的需求事项。在【需求事项】中，属于无法实现的事项、最恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en:
To fulfill the [requirements], Mr. B investigated commercially available systems that use RFID (Radio Frequency Identification) and devised the following measures.
(1) Issue user cards with built-in RFID (Radio Frequency Identification), attach sheet-shaped RFID (Radio Frequency Identification) to books, and newly introduce RFID (Radio Frequency Identification) readers used at the counter when lending and returning books.
(2) Install RFID (Radio Frequency Identification) readers on the shelf boards of all bookshelves, and introduce a system that checks books against bookshelves.
(3) Install an RFID (Radio Frequency Identification) reader at the return post (book drop).
After organizing the effects of measures (1) to (3), Mr. B realized that there were requirements that these measures could not fulfill. Among the [requirements], which one is the most appropriate as an item that cannot be fulfilled?

stem.zh: A 图书馆除了书籍之外，还提供杂志供阅览，但不提供外借。由于购买杂志的预算有限，B 先生希望优先购买读者经常阅读的杂志。为此，他调查了能否利用新系统拟引入的 RFID 来采集数据，并将这些数据用作更换杂志时的参考。杂志摆放在带有放置杂志的隔板的架子（以下称为杂志架）上。在调查采用 RFID 的市售系统后发现：将加工成片状的 RFID 贴在杂志上，并在每一块隔板上安装 RFID 读取装置，就能记录杂志从隔板上被取出的时刻和放回隔板的时刻。从用这一机制采集到的数据中能够获得的信息，恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Library A offers magazines for reading in addition to books, but it does not lend them out. Because the budget for purchasing magazines is limited, Mr. B wants to give priority to purchasing magazines that are frequently read by users. He therefore investigated whether the RFID being considered for the new system could be used to collect data, and whether that data could serve as a reference when replacing magazines. The magazines are placed on a rack that has shelves for holding magazines (hereafter called the magazine rack). After examining a commercially available RFID-based system, he found that by attaching sheet-shaped RFID tags to the magazines and installing an RFID reader on each shelf, the system can record the time a magazine is taken off a shelf and the time it is returned to the shelf. Which of the following is appropriate information that can be obtained from the data collected using this mechanism?

ア.zh: 对于每本杂志，可以获取它从杂志架的隔板上被取出的次数，以及被取出期间的平均时长。
ア.en: For each magazine, the number of times it was taken off the shelf of the magazine rack and the average length of time it was taken out can be obtained.

イ.zh: 对于每本杂志，可以按读者的年龄段获取它从杂志架的隔板上被取出的次数，以及被取出期间的平均时长。
イ.en: For each magazine, the number of times it was taken off the shelf of the magazine rack and the average length of time it was taken out can be obtained by user age group.

ウ.zh: 对于每本杂志，可以按星期几、按读者性别获取它从杂志架的隔板上被取出的次数。
ウ.en: For each magazine, the number of times it was taken off the shelf of the magazine rack can be obtained by day of the week and by user gender.

エ.zh: 对于同一个人多次取出某本杂志的情况，可排除重复计数，从而对于每本杂志获取将它从杂志架的隔板上取出过的人数。
エ.en: When the same person takes out a certain magazine multiple times, the duplicates can be eliminated, so that for each magazine the number of people who took it off the shelf of the magazine rack can be obtained.
